label: 1512 CE
era_summary: Year 1512 (MDXII) was a leap year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1512: Pope, Spain, Venice, Swiss Con, emperor, England-France, Scotland, Florence, 1511-14. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1512: Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Pope, Spain, Venice, Swiss Con, emperor, England-France, Scotland, Florence, 1511-14; Algiers-Spain (Tunis, Bone, Tlemcen), 1511-14. Maddison records GDP/capita 1409 (ESP, 1512) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
